name: yellow corridor
hints: A yellow corridor with a button to return and a path continuing west.
PRESS YELLOW to return through the security door. Go WEST to reach maintenance room 2.
Go WEST to maintenance room 2 (room 17) for tools. PRESS YELLOW to go back through the yellow door to room 10.

effects: Message: The door opens just long enough for me to scurry through.

notes: Yellow corridor inside the maintenance-secured area. WEST leads to maintenance room 2 (room 17) with mop and wire cutters. PRESS YELLOW returns through the door to room 10.
